title: I Quit Corporate Tech at 33. Here’s the Brutal, Beautiful Reality of My First Year in FIRE.
subtitle: An unfiltered reflection on the first 365 days outside the corporate matrix.
description: I achieved Financial Independence and Retired Early (FIRE) at 33. After a year of zero commutes, building products, fixing my body, and escaping the tech bro echo chamber, here is what early retirement actually looks like.
